---
title: "Appendix A: Supplementary Material"
---

## A.1 Survey instrument (Paper 1)

The full survey instrument used in Paper 1 is reproduced below. Items were piloted with three programme directors and refined based on cognitive interviews.

::: {.callout-note}
## Survey administration

The survey was administered online via Qualtrics between September and November 2025. Programme directors received an initial invitation followed by two reminder emails at two-week intervals.
:::

## A.2 Experimental protocol (Paper 2)

The pre-registered protocol for the Paper 2 experiment is available at the project's Open Science Framework registry.

## A.3 Interview topic guide (Paper 3)

The semi-structured interview topic guide developed for Paper 3 is reproduced below.

1. **Opening**: Tell me about your current doctoral supervisees.
2. **Tooling**: Are any of your supervisees using a policy-compliant authoring tool? Which tool? How did they come to use it?
3. **Experience**: What has been your experience of working with candidates who use these tools?
4. **Tensions**: Have there been moments of difficulty or tension related to the tool?
5. **Authority**: Whose decisions does the tool encode? Do you see this as appropriate?
6. **Future**: Would you encourage other candidates to use the tool? Under what circumstances?

::: {.callout-tip}
## Reproducibility

All quantitative results in Papers 1 and 2 are reproducible from the analysis code at the project repository. Qualitative coding for Paper 3 is documented in a separate codebook.
:::
